verificationItems.name: 未授权时不捕获 (No capture when unauthorized)
verificationItems.description: When notification-listener permission is NOT granted, the app must not capture or store any notification content.
verificationItems.method: Disable listener in settings, send test notification, check database for new records.

verificationItems.name: 用户授权后绑定服务 (Service binds after user authorization)
verificationItems.description: After the user grants notification access, the listener service binds and becomes active.
verificationItems.method: Grant permission, verify `adb shell dumpsys notification` shows the component as enabled.

verificationItems.name: 空白名单不提取 (Empty whitelist yields no extras)
verificationItems.description: With an empty courier whitelist, no pickup codes are extracted even from valid courier notifications.
verificationItems.method: Clear whitelist, send courier notification, verify no parcel record created.

verificationItems.name: 非白名单应用不捕获 (Non-whitelisted app not captured)
verificationItems.description: Notifications from apps not in the whitelist are ignored entirely.
verificationItems.method: Send notification from non-whitelisted app, verify no record and no log of content.

verificationItems.name: 白名单应用捕获取件码 (Whitelisted courier captures pickup code)
verificationItems.description: Notifications from whitelisted courier apps are parsed and the pickup code extracted correctly.
verificationItems.method: Add courier to whitelist, send notification with pickup code, verify parcel record with correct code.

verificationItems.name: 通知删除后处理 (Notification removed handling)
verificationItems.description: When the source notification is dismissed by the user, the stored parcel record remains intact (not auto-deleted).
verificationItems.method: Capture a parcel, swipe away the source notification, verify parcel record persists.

verificationItems.name: 相同取件码去重 (Duplicate pickup code deduplication)
verificationItems.description: Repeated notifications with the same pickup code do not create duplicate parcel records.
verificationItems.method: Send same courier notification twice, verify only one parcel record exists.

verificationItems.name: 后台被杀后恢复 (Recovery after background kill)
verificationItems.description: After the system kills the app process, the listener resumes capturing on the next notification.
verificationItems.method: Force-stop the app, send courier notification, verify capture resumes.

verificationItems.name: 锁屏时不泄露 (No leak on lock screen)
verificationItems.description: Pickup codes are not exposed in notification text or lock-screen visibility; app uses private/redacted notifications.
verificationItems.method: Lock screen, verify system notifications from the app do not reveal pickup codes.

verificationItems.name: 权限撤销后停止 (Stops after permission revoked)
verificationItems.description: When notification access is revoked, the listener stops immediately and no further capture occurs.
verificationItems.method: Revoke notification access, send courier notification, verify no capture and clean shutdown.

_meta.description: Notification listener verification template with 10 mandatory checks for the alpha2 real-device test.
